name: blob-decode-unicode-whitespace-rejected
comment: A non-breaking space (U+00A0) is not ASCII whitespace. Both ports strip only an explicit ASCII whitespace class before validating, rather than a regex \s shorthand, because JS's \s matches a wider set than Python's - a shared \s would strip this character in TS and keep it in Python, handing the two decoders different input. Both reject.
